unit.detail: F0 full monorepo suite green: 18 units via run_test_suite.py in 1.8 min. shipwright-test plugin 143 passed serially (the suite carrying the fixed test). No regressions.

integration.detail: plugins/shipwright-test/tests/test_performance_check_integration.py 7 passed; the F0 suite also runs integration-tests + shared/tests green.

e2e.detail: test-only change; no user-experienced surface (see surface_verification.surface=none)

surface_verification.justification: Test-only change: redirects the perf-check integration test's --cwd from the tracked fixtures dir to tmp_path so the runner's triage emission is throwaway. No production/runtime/UI surface; correctness proven by the shipwright-test integration suite (143/143) driving performance_check end-to-end via subprocess.

degraded.detail: classify_complexity returned 'medium' (prior_source=keyword) from the description prose (performance/integration/gate/lighthouse); the actual diff is one test function pointed at tmp_path with no risk flags. Overridden to 'small' via the Stage-2 Repo Scout, matching the surgical-changes scope.

enumeration_basis.note: single AC: the block-gate failure path must emit triage into a throwaway root, not the tracked fixtures dir

behaviors.behavior: AC1: test_block_gate_fails_when_lighthouse_below_budget drives performance_check with --cwd=tmp_path so the failed-sub-check triage emission (.shipwright/triage.jsonl) lands in a throwaway root, never the tracked tests/fixtures dir; the tree stays clean after a full serial 'pytest tests/'
